heading: Joint Forces Staff College: duration of principal course of instruction
label: 2156 Joint Forces Staff College: duration of principal course of instruction

children.heading: .—Duration
children.label: a .—Duration
children.text: The duration of the principal course of instruction offered at the Joint Forces Staff College may not be less than 10 weeks of resident instruction.

children.heading: .—Definition
children.label: b .—Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “principal course of instruction” means any course of instruction offered at the Joint Forces Staff College as Phase II joint professional military education.
